harness: codex exec --json --ephemeral --full-auto from throwaway run directories

history_isolation.verification_method: The runner required --ephemeral, used -C <run-root>/.../repo, kept raw logs under <run-root>, and counted new Codex session files that referenced the throwaway run root.
history_isolation.verification_limitation: A session-file count changed while evals ran; this may be from another Codex process, because the harness uses --ephemeral and a throwaway cwd.

command_template: GOMODCACHE=<run-root>/<variant>/<scenario>/gomodcache (prewarmed with go mod download before agent execution)

codex exec --json --ephemeral --full-auto --skip-git-repo-check --add-dir <run-root>/<variant>/<scenario> -C <run-root>/<variant>/<scenario>/repo -m gpt-5.4-mini -c model_reasoning_effort="medium" -c shell_environment_policy.inherit=all <natural user prompt>
cli_status: runnable: cli variant uses go run ./cmd/openhealth weight and blood-pressure commands with a prewarmed per-scenario module cache

stop_loss.policy: After production hardening, keep CLI as the baseline recommendation if production loses correctness, directly inspects generated files, inspects the module cache, uses broad repo search in more than one routine scenario, uses the openhealth CLI, uses direct SQLite access, exceeds core tool thresholds, or uses more than 2x CLI tools in at least three comparable scenarios.
triggers: production used more than 2x CLI tools in bp-invalid-input, invalid-input, non-iso-date-reject

criteria.name: no_direct_generated_file_inspection
criteria.details: production must not directly inspect generated files

criteria.name: no_module_cache_inspection
criteria.details: production must not inspect the Go module cache

criteria.name: no_routine_broad_repo_search
criteria.details: production must not use broad repo search in routine scenarios

criteria.name: no_openhealth_cli_usage
criteria.details: production must not use the openhealth CLI

criteria.name: no_direct_sqlite_access
criteria.details: production must not use direct SQLite access

criteria.name: minimum_scenarios_at_or_below_cli
criteria.details: 5 scenarios at or below CLI tools; required 14 of 17

criteria.name: no_routine_scenario_exceeds_cli_by_more_than_one_tool
criteria.details: no routine scenario exceeded CLI by more than one tool

raw_logs_note: Raw codex exec event logs and stderr files were retained under <run-root> during execution and intentionally not committed.
token_usage_caveat: Token metrics come from codex exec turn.completed usage events when exposed; unavailable usage must be recorded as not_exposed.
app_server_fallback: not used: codex exec --json exposed enough event detail for this run
